heading: Definitions
label: 7501 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–113, div. O, title IX, § 901129 Stat. 3031Dec. 18, 2015“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘National Oceans and Coastal Security Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–113, div. O, title IX, § 901129 Stat. 3031Dec. 18, 2015“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘National Oceans and Coastal Security Act’.”

children.heading: Coastal county
children.label: 1 Coastal county
children.text: The term “coastal county” has the meaning given the term by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration in the document entitled “NOAA’s List of Coastal Counties for the Bureau of the Census” (or similar successor document).

children.heading: Coastal State
children.label: 2 Coastal State
children.text: The term “coastal State” has the meaning given the term “coastal state” in .section 1453 of this title

children.heading: Foundation
children.label: 3 Foundation
children.text: The term “Foundation” means the National Fish and Wildlife Foundation established by .section 3701(a) of this title

children.heading: Fund
children.label: 4 Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the National Oceans and Coastal Security Fund established under .section 7503(a) of this title

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 5 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” means any federally recognized Indian tribe.

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 6 Administrator
children.text: Except as otherwise specifically provided, the term “Administrator” means the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere and Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Tidal shoreline
children.label: 7 Tidal shoreline
children.text: The term “tidal shoreline” has the meaning given that term pursuant to section 923.110(c)(2)(i) of title 15, Code of Federal Regulations, or a similar successor regulation.
